race.comment: Tough race to end the day. STOCKHOLM (8) deep into the prep and building towards another win. Took control early when he jumped out to the 1600m for a gritty second in the Parkes Cup. Saves his best for this track and trip and will prove tough to beat. NEW PHAROAH (3) is racing in career best form, and he gets a similar set-up today. Shouldered the 58.5kg for a comfortable victory over 1520m at Inverell. Back slightly in trip and can win again. KRANICH (5) is holding his form in similar company and well placed with Stiff's claim. Returned good closing figures with an eye-catching fourth over 1400m at Scone in the Country Cup. Genuine contender. GREEN RUN (7) comes out of a strong contest with an eye-catching fourth over 1600m in the Gunnedah Cup. Back in trip and has a solid record here.
